sections.paragraph:
verb לרעוד

to tremble, shake

verb להירעד

to tremble, shake

verb להרעיד

to shake, cause to tremble

verb הורעד

be shaken, caused to tremble

masculine noun

tremble, shivering, shudder, quiver, tremulousness, flutter, palpitation, quake, quaver, shake, wobble, wobbliness; fear; shock
